nasb.text: Because of the voice of him who reproaches and reviles, Because of the presence of the enemy and the avenger.

esv.text: at the sound of the taunter and reviler, at the sight of the enemy and the avenger.

cnv.text: 都因那辱罵和毀謗的人的聲音， 並因仇敵和報仇者的緣故。

ccb.text: 因为咒骂和毁谤我的人讥笑我，仇敌报复我。

csbs.text: 这是因辱骂者和亵渎者的声音， 是因仇敌和报复者的缘故。
